description: Validation report emitted by edgp validate for JSON reports, report bundles, bundle archives, and export batches.

bundleArchiveVerification.description: Nested deterministic report-bundle archive verification payload when validating a report-bundle archive.

bundleVerification.description: Nested report-bundle verification payload when validating a report-bundle directory.

contract.description: Documented contract used to validate the target.

exportBatchArchiveVerification.description: Nested deterministic export-batch archive verification payload when validating an export-batch archive.

exportBatchVerification.description: Nested export-batch verification payload when validating an export-batch directory.

failures.description: Validation failures normalized for CLI, CI, and static HTML reporting.

ok.description: True when the target satisfies the selected contract and any nested bundle/archive verification.

reportStatus.description: Optional top-level status copied from a successfully validated EDGP JSON report.

reportSummary.description: Optional top-level summary copied from a successfully validated EDGP JSON report.

reportTopFindings.description: Optional top findings copied from a successfully validated EDGP JSON report.

schemaFile.description: Schema file name used for JSON-file validation targets.

target.description: Absolute target path passed to edgp validate.

triageSummary.description: Optional triage summary copied from a verified report bundle or archive.

title: EDGP Validation Report v1
